Class Incident

java.lang.Object
cityrescue.Incident
public class Incident extends Object
Representation of the Incidents

    • Incident

      public Incident(int incidentId, IncidentType type, int severity, int x, int y)
      Constructor for an Incident
      Parameters:
      incidentId - Unique ID of incident
      type - Type of Incident
      severity - current severity
      x - X position
      y - Y position
